items.why: Auth middleware, token issuance/verification, API layer all live here.
JWT pitfalls, cryptography, web security, and threat models belong here.
TLS protocols, HSTS, perimeter controls that protect token transit.
Key rotation runbooks, observability, SLOs for auth failures.
Stateless vs stateful tradeoffs, multi-region, failover.
Strategy + Chain-of-Responsibility + Adapter patterns for auth middleware.
